stemHtml: A twin-engine propeller aircraft suffers an engine failure. Under which of the following circumstances is retention of control likely to be most difficult?

options.a: Aerodrome at low density altitude, critical engine failure at the point of go-around.
options.b: Aerodrome at low density altitude, critical engine failure after take-off.
options.c: Aerodrome at high density altitude, critical engine failure at the point of go-around.
options.d: Aerodrome at high density altitude, critical engine failure after take-off.
